nodes.name: Extract Order Data

parameters.subject: Shopify Order Validation Failed - {{ $json.order_id }}
parameters.text:
=

  • ' + e + '

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, order_id: $json.order_id, message: 'Order received and queued for fulfillment' }) }}
